title.en: Potato cultivation — up-country + heat-tolerant dry-zone recommendation
title.ta: உருளைக்கிழங்கு பயிர்ச்செய்கை — மலைநாடு + வறண்ட வலய பரிந்துரை

summary.en: HORDI recommendation for potato (Solanum tuberosum). Released varieties Golden Star and Granola for up-country (Nuwara Eliya, Badulla); heat-tolerant lines for Jaffna and Kalpitiya dry-zone systems. Soil pH 5.5–6.6. Spacing 60 × 25 cm; seed rate 2,000 kg/ha seed tubers. Three-stage fertilizer schedule with site-specific MOP adjustments. Remove haulms 2 weeks before harvest. Yield 20–25 t/ha.
summary.si: අර්තාපල් (Solanum tuberosum) සඳහා HORDI නිර්දේශය. නිකුත් කළ ප්‍රභේද Golden Star සහ Granola උඩරට (නුවරඑළිය, බදුල්ල) සඳහා; යාපනය සහ කල්පිටිය වියළි කලාප පද්ධති සඳහා තාපය දරා ගන්නා ප්‍රභේද. පස් pH 5.5-6.6. පරතරය 60 × 25 cm; බීජ මාත්‍රාව 2,000 kg/ha බීජ අල. අදියර තුනක පොහොර වැඩසටහන. අස්වැන්න ටොන් 20-25/හෙ.
summary.ta: உருளைக்கிழங்கு (Solanum tuberosum) பயிர்ச்செய்கைக்கான HORDI பரிந்துரை. நுவரெலியா, பதுளை மலைநாட்டிற்கான Golden Star மற்றும் Granola வகைகள்; யாழ்ப்பாணம் மற்றும் கல்பிட்டியா வறண்ட வலய முறைமைகளுக்கு வெப்பம் தாங்கும் வகைகள். மண் pH 5.5-6.6. இடைவெளி 60 × 25 cm; விதை அளவு 2,000 kg/ha விதைக் கிழங்குகள். மூன்று கட்ட உர அட்டவணை. அறுவடைக்கு 2 வாரங்களுக்கு முன் தண்டுகளை அகற்றவும். மகசூல் 20-25 டன்/ஹெக்டேர்.

field_provenance.notes: Fertilizer rates below capture the primary up-country / Jaffna calcic red latosol schedule. Kalpitiya regosol schedule and rice-based cropping system variant are summarised in a paired knowledge chunk.

body.en: Well-drained soil at pH 5.5–6.6. Prepare raised beds and planting furrows for 60 × 25 cm spacing.
Plant certified seed tubers at 60 × 25 cm. Seed rate 2,000 kg/ha.
Cut haulms 2 weeks before harvest to cure skins and reduce late-blight spread to tubers.
Harvest when tops have died back and skins have set. Yield 20–25 t/ha.

notes.en: Leaf miner. Azadirachtin 1% EC 16 ml/16 L, or Abamectin 18 g/L EC 9.6 ml/16 L.
Potato tuber moth (field stage). Chlorantraniliprole 20% + Thiamethoxam 20% WG 5 g/16 L. Hill soil up around stems to reduce tuber exposure.
Black cutworm at establishment. Profenophos 500 g/L EC 32 ml/16 L, or Etofenprox 100 g/L EC 24 ml/16 L.

Late blight (Phytophthora infestans) — the single biggest up-country yield killer. Rotate Mancozeb / Metalaxyl / Fluazinam at 7–10 day intervals under cool-wet conditions. Destroy infected haulms; never replant into infected fields within 3 years.
Early blight (Alternaria solani). Mancozeb 80% WP or Maneb at first leaf lesions.
Bacterial wilt (Ralstonia solanacearum). No chemical control — use certified seed tubers, rotate with non-solanaceous crops (preferably cereals) for ≥3 years, and avoid replanting in flooded fields.
